udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Errors returned to the caller. The backend middleware translates these\ninto x402 402 responses with human-readable messages.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: Error

cases.doc: The operator hasn't set a cap for this agent yet.
cases.name: NoBudgetSet

cases.doc: The agent's daily cap is zero (effectively blocked).
cases.name: CapIsZero

cases.doc: The agent has already spent their daily allowance.
cases.name: DailyCapExceeded

cases.doc: Negative or zero amount passed to try_spend.
cases.name: InvalidAmount

udt_struct_v0.doc: Storage key: (operator, agent) \xe2\x86\x92 AgentBudget.\nThe operator is part of the key so multiple operators can use the same\ncontract instance without polluting each other's agent registries.
udt_struct_v0.name: AgentKey

function_v0.doc: Set (or update) the daily spending cap for an agent, in USDC stroops.\nOnly the operator can call this. Passing 0 effectively blocks the agent.
function_v0.name: set_cap

function_v0.doc: Attempt to spend `amount_stroops` from the agent's daily budget.\nReturns the remaining allowance after the spend. Fails if over cap.
function_v0.name: try_spend

function_v0.doc: Read-only: returns (spent_today, cap) for an agent. Used by dashboards.\nReturns (0, 0) if no budget is set.
function_v0.name: get_budget
